algorithms.Duplicated.time_duplicated.name: algorithms.Duplicated.time_duplicated

algorithms.DuplicatedMaskedArray.time_du.code:
class DuplicatedMaskedArray:
    def time_duplicated(self, unique, keep, dtype):
        self.ser.duplicated(keep=keep)

def setup(*args, **kwargs):
    # This function just needs to be imported into each benchmark file to
    # set up the random seed before each function.
    # https://asv.readthedocs.io/en/latest/writing_benchmarks.html
    np.random.seed(1234)
    # Collect garbage before each timing sample so that bimodal results
    # from gen-0 collections firing mid-measurement are damped.
    gc.collect()

class DuplicatedMaskedArray:
    def setup(self, unique, keep, dtype):
        N = 10**5
        data = pd.Series(np.arange(N), dtype=dtype)
        data[list(range(1, N, 100))] = pd.NA
        if not unique:
            data = data.repeat(5)
        self.ser = data
        # cache is_unique
        self.ser.is_unique
algorithms.DuplicatedMaskedArray.time_du.name: algorithms.DuplicatedMaskedArray.time_duplicated
